mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books b
b.title ILIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM book_categories bc WHERE bc.book_id = b.id AND bc.category_id = #{categoryId} )
SELECT a.id, a.name FROM authors a INNER JOIN book_authors ba ON ba.author_id = a.id WHERE ba.book_id = #{id} ORDER BY a.id
SELECT c.id, c.name FROM categories c INNER JOIN book_categories bc ON bc.category_id = c.id WHERE bc.book_id = #{id} ORDER BY c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (title, isbn, published_year, description) VALUES (#{title}, #{isbn}, #{publishedYear}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND returned_at IS NULL
